title: Fortune 500 Tech Company: $3M Revenue Alignment
excerpt: A leading enterprise software company aligned 2,000+ sales reps to a new go-to-market strategy in 6 weeks using optimized SPM.

challenge.title: Misaligned Incentive Structures
challenge.description: The organization was planning a major pivot to a new market segment, but their existing ICM platform was built for the old business model.
bullets: Territory structure didn't reflect new market priorities
Compensation plans were still tied to legacy product lines
Sales reps were incentivized to sell products the company was de-emphasizing

solution.title: Rapid ICM Optimization & Territory Redesign
solution.description: We optimized their existing Anaplan implementation rather than replacing it, designing new territory structures and compensation models.
approach: Analyzed performance data to identify top performers in new market
Redesigned territories to reflect market opportunity and rep capacity
Reconfigured compensation plans in Anaplan to align with new strategy
Compressed cycle from 12 to 6 weeks using streamlined approval workflows

testimonial.quote: BHG didn't try to replace our platform. They optimized what we had, saving us millions in re-implementation costs while actually improving results.
testimonial.author: VP of Sales Operations

nextSteps: Expand optimization to other business units
Implement predictive analytics for territory planning
